stories.title: **Headline:** No. 2 Oklahoma at No. 4 Texas — Red River Showdown Opens Friday on ESPN2

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The biggest series of the year starts TOMORROW.

No. 2 Oklahoma (38-3) at No. 4 Texas (32-4).

OU leads the SEC by 2 games. Texas won the title last year. Kendall Wells has 30 HRs.

Three games. All on ESPN. All of it matters.

#Softball #NCAASoftball #SoonerSoftball #HookEm

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
WELLS WATCH 🔥

Kendall Wells needs 7 HRs to break the all-time NCAA single-season record.

She faces TEXAS this weekend.

The defending national champs. Their pitching staff. Their home crowd.

No pressure, freshman. #NCAASoftball #SoonerSoftball

article.headline: Red River Showdown: No. 2 Oklahoma at No. 4 Texas Is the Series College Softball Has Been Waiting For

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells Ties NCAA Freshman HR Record — 30 Home Runs in 40 Games

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells just tied the NCAA freshman home run record.

30 HRs. 40 games.

She reached it 22 FEWER GAMES than anyone else in DI history.

Jocelyn Alo. Lauren Chamberlain. Kelly Majam.

Now: Kendall Wells.

History made. #SoonerSoftball #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Three Sooners hold the NCAA freshman HR record at 30:

✦ Lauren Chamberlain — 2012
✦ Jocelyn Alo — 2018
✦ Kendall Wells — 2026

Oklahoma doesn't just build champions.

They BUILD RECORD-BREAKERS. #SoonerSoftball #Softball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Ties NCAA Freshman Home Run Record at 30 — And She Reached It Faster Than Anyone

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Rises to No. 1 — NiJaree Canady Hits 1,000 Career Strikeouts

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady struck out 17 batters in one game.

Then reached 1,000 CAREER strikeouts. 102nd pitcher in NCAA history.

Texas Tech is No. 1 again.

Canady is simply different. #WreckEm #NCAASoftball #Softball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Reaches 1,000 Career Strikeouts as Texas Tech Reclaims No. 1

stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama Upsets No. 1 Texas — First Series Win Over a No. 1 Team Since 2016

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alabama just beat No. 1 Texas to win the series.

Their first series win over a No. 1 team since 2016.

Crimson Tide is 35-3 and No. 3 in the country.

Don't sleep on Alabama in the SEC race. #RollTide #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Alabama Beats No. 1 Texas in Series — Crimson Tide's First Win Over a Top-Ranked Team Since 2016

stories.title: **Headline:** FSU Extends Win Streak to 25, Heads to No. 24 Stanford for Road Series

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Florida State has won 25 STRAIGHT games.

Best active win streak in DI softball. Now ranked No. 5.

Isa Torres is hitting .610 — leading all of college softball.

FSU heads to Stanford this weekend. The streak lives. #Noles #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** NFCA Week 9 Rankings — Texas Tech Returns to No. 1 After Texas Falls

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 9 Top 5:

1. Texas Tech
2. Oklahoma
3. Alabama
4. Texas
5. Florida State

Alabama is the biggest mover — up to No. 3 after sweeping the series from No. 1 Texas.

Wild week in college softball. #NCAASoftball #Softball
